instruction: Move the green block onto the red block.
Tell me how many blocks are on the table.
Turn on the LED to soft blue.
Wait two seconds then return to top view.
Use the wiper to clean the desk surface.
Pick up the toy and place it in the basket.
What color is the largest block?
Move the red block next to the yellow block without stacking.
Shake your head if you cannot see the object.
